name: Cream Cheese Ice Cream
recipeIngredient: 3 packages cream cheese (8 ounces each), softened
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, beat the cream cheese and sugar with an electric mixer on medium speed until smooth.
2. Add the eggs, lemon juice, and vanilla extract to the bowl. Beat until well combined.
3. Stir in the light cream.
4. Pour the mixture into an ice cream freezer and freeze according to the manufacturer's directions.
5. This recipe yields about 3 quarts.
